title: Growth notification UI
summary: 34b가 적재한 성장 notification을 priority toast stack(mobile 2/desktop 3), level_up 강조, group_key 묶음, rendered/collapsed-only seen 처리, MYPAGE 최근 성장 기록/보관함 surface, 장보기 안내 문구로 사용자에게 보여주는 FE-only slice. backend contract는 소비만 한다.
goal: 여러 성장 알림이 동시에 발생해도 서버 우선순위대로 유실 없이 보이고, 놓친 알림은 보관함에서 다시 볼 수 있으며, 장보기 성장 카운트 기준이 문구로 혼동되지 않게 한다.

required_checks: pnpm vitest run tests/growth-toast-stack.test.tsx tests/gamification-archive-surface.test.tsx tests/user-gamification-api-client.test.ts tests/meal-api-client.test.ts tests/mypage-gamification-card.test.tsx tests/shopping-flow-screen.test.tsx
verify_commands: pnpm vitest run tests/growth-toast-stack.test.tsx tests/gamification-archive-surface.test.tsx tests/user-gamification-api-client.test.ts tests/meal-api-client.test.ts tests/mypage-gamification-card.test.tsx tests/shopping-flow-screen.test.tsx

notes: Stage 4 frontend implementation is complete locally on feature/fe-34c-growth-notification-ui. FE-only slice consumes the merged 34b backend contract (PR #731) with no backend/schema change. Verification passed: targeted Vitest, targeted 34c/33c Playwright, CI=1 pnpm verify:frontend:pr, exploratory QA/eval 97, workflow/workpack validators, and diff check. CI=1 pnpm verify:frontend was attempted; lint/typecheck/product/build/Lighthouse passed, then full regression stopped on unrelated existing slice-09/slice-12a/slice-17b failures reproduced with line-targeted Playwright outside 34c paths. Claude review on session daf4b849-9bee-44f4-b2f5-92111db03c19 was rate-limited until 2026-06-12 01:20 KST, so Codex self-review proceeded per user instruction and fixed viewport-shrink toast timer cleanup plus mobile archive auth guard. MYPAGE profile header integration and badge/grade assets remain reserved for 34d.
out_of_scope: Badge/grade image concepts and SVG/CSS production components (34d)
Backend public contract or schema changes
Bundle-based shopping quest count public field (contract evolution candidate)
